creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #14)
There are ready to use vm images for aarch64 too ;-). I used this one:
https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/snapshots/VM-IMAGES/14.0-CURRENT/aarch64/20210701/FreeBSD-14.0-CURRENT-arm64-aarch64-20210701-c5f4772c66d-247671.qcow2.xz
